# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.111 — Definition

In this subchapter, “advance acquisition” means an acquisition by the commission under Section 202.112 (Advance Acquisitions) .

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1325, Sec. 3.02, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “advance acquisition” means an acquisition by the commission under Section 202.112 (Advance Acquisitions) .
